basic_details.job_title: Federal Bank Associate Officer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: The Federal Bank (Federal Bank) has officially announced the Associate Officer (Sales) Recruitment 2026 through a walk-in drive in Bengaluru. Published at the official website https://www.federalbank.co.in, this recruitment offers full-time positions with an annual CTC ranging from ₹4.64 Lakh to ₹6.70 Lakh. Eligible candidates aged up to 27 years and possessing a minimum of 50% in graduation can attend the walk-in recruitment on 09 May 2026 and 10 May 2026. Candidates are required to carry original documents, two copies of their CV, domicile proof, and a smartphone with internet access. Pre-re

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 27 Years (born on or after 01.05.1999)

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Federal Bank Associate Officer (Sales) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Federal Bank Associate Officer (Sales) recruitment is 10 May 2026. Candidates are encouraged to attend the walk-in interview on the specified dates.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Associate Officer (Sales) post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Associate Officer (Sales) post is a Graduation degree with a minimum of 50% marks.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Federal Bank Associate Officer (Sales) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Associate Officer (Sales) position is 27 years. Candidates should be born on or after 01.05.1999.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Associate Officer (Sales) role?
faq.answer: The annual CTC offered for the Associate Officer (Sales) role ranges from ₹4.64 Lakh to ₹6.70 Lakh.

faq.question: Q5. How can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply for this recruitment through a Walk-in process. It is recommended to pre-register via QR Code, but walk-ins without registration will be accommodated on a first-come, first-served basis.

faq.question: Q6. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry two copies of their CV, Domicile Proof (Aadhaar, Voter ID, Passport or Driving License), Original Mark List & Degree Certificate of Graduation, and a Smart Phone with Internet Connection.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview for Federal Bank Associate Officer (Sales) being held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is being held in Bengaluru, Karnataka.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Associate Officer (Sales) post?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Spot Assessment followed by a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. Are freshers eligible to apply for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, this is a walk-in recruitment drive for freshers for the post of Associate Officer (Sales).
